description_long: This object is a modern, tactical-style shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent, angular magazine protruding below the receiver. The stock is minimalist and straight, extending directly back from the receiver, and appears to be a fixed, synthetic type. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, and the receiver has a flat top with what may be mounting points for optics or accessories. The trigger guard is squared and robust, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design is utilitarian and streamlined, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A matte black, tactical shotgun with a straight synthetic stock, ribbed fore-end, and angular magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the straight stock, ribbed fore-end, and angular magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the linear alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, robust, medium-sized with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
